title: One Piece Reveals New Opening & Ending Featuring Mural and Holy Knights
content: ONE PIECE anime revealed the new opening and ending videos, featuring the theme songs by AiNA THE END and Jisoku 36km. The anime returned after a 3-month break on April 5, starting the Elbaph Arc.
author: Anime Corner

title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend Film Unveils Tomoe Koga Visual
content: The staff for Seishun Buta Yarō wa Dear Friend no Yume o Minai ( Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend ) film, the latest anime of Hajime Kamoshida 's Rascal Does Not Dream (Seishun Buta Yarō or Aobuta) novel series, presented a new "memorial visual" featuring Tomoe Koga via a video on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen’s Sequel Has an Exciting Update For Fans This Month
content: The exciting Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo manga reached its conclusion in March 2026 after six months of serialization. The sequel series was released in September 2025, one year after the main story’s conclusion.
author: ComicBook

title: Japan Aims to Increase Anime's Overseas Market to 6 Trillion Yen by 2033
content: The Japanese Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI) held its 18th Entertainment and Creative Industrial Policy Seminar on March 27, where it announced how specifically to meet the Japanese government's goal to expand the overseas market for its domestic creative industries to 20 trillion yen (about US$125…
author: ANN

title: Creator of Crunchyroll’s Major Fantasy Anime Addresses Major Change in Season 2: “Climax From The Very Beginning”
content: The highly anticipated Spring 2026 anime season is finally here and all set to premiere the second season of Crunchyroll’s action fantasy anime, Wistoria: Wand and Sword . As the first month of the season, April is an exciting month for anime fans with several new series, and as always, most of them will begin…
author: ComicBook

title: Spring 2026’s Most Anticipated Anime Has Arrived, And It’s Already the Year’s Best New Series
content: Every new anime slated for the Spring season has now been released, and among the dozens of titles, only one has truly emerged as the best. Even among the many releases, nearly half a dozen stood out as the most anticipated.
author: ComicBook

title: Joker Game Gets 4th Stage Play
content: The staff for the stage play adaptations of Production I.G 's Joker Game spy anime series announced on Friday the series will receive a new stage play titled Joker Game IV next year in February. The play will run in Tokyo and in the Kansai region. The fourth show celebrates the 10th anniversary of the stage series.
author: ANN

title: Kill Blue Anime Gets Same-Day English Dub
content: Amazon's Prime Video streaming service and Netflix began streaming an English dub for the television anime of Tadatoshi Fujimaki 's Kill Blue manga on the same day as they released the first episode of the anime with English subtitles. Bang Zoom!
author: ANN

title: Inazuma Eleven Cross Game Launches for iOS, Android in June
content: Level 5 and Aiming ( Dragon Quest Tact ) announced during the "LEVEL5 VISION 2026 Craftsmanship" stream on Friday the Inazuma Eleven: Cross game will launch for iOS and Android in June. Pre-registration is open now. Inazuma Eleven: Cross will be free-to-play with in-app purchases.
author: ANN

title: Level 5's Holy Horror Mansion Game Unveils New Trailer
content: Level 5 revealed a new trailer for its new "ghost craft" role-playing game HOLY HORROR MANSION during the "LEVEL5 VISION 2026 Craftsmanship" livestream on Friday. Level 5 is partnering with entertainment companies for the game, which is themed around "family." The company did not reveal platforms or a release date.
author: ANN
